topic.name: 科技、能源与产业
topic.description: 关注人工智能、芯片、太空、能源转型与关键产业
topic.query: technology artificial intelligence semiconductor energy industry

overview: 今日专题“科技、能源与产业”。共筛选 23 个高价值事件，重点关注中国相关进展、美国相关进展及全球外交、经济与安全动态。

items.title: US issues ‘worldwide caution’ for American citizens – as it happened
items.summary: This blog is now closed – our live coverage of the Middle East crisis continues here The price of oil jumped in early Asian trade on Monday after the US carried out its latest wave of strikes on Iran and a vessel caught fire in the strait of Hormuz. Brent crude for September delivery rose 2.72% to $90.50 a barrel by around 0100 GMT, after briefly crossing $91 – its highest price since June. CENTCOM assets targeted Iranian military command centers, air defense and coastal surveillance sites, maritime capabilities, missile and drone launch sites, and communications networks to further diminish Iran’s ability to attack commercial vessels and civilian mariners transiting the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. military is holding Iran accountable at the Commander in Chief’s direction. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 美国发布针对美国公民的“全球警告”——事件回顾
items.summaryZh: 受美伊冲突升级影响，布伦特原油价格在亚洲早盘交易中上涨至每桶90.50美元。美军中央司令部表示，已针对伊朗军事指挥中心、防空系统及导弹发射场发动打击，旨在削弱伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的威胁能力。
items.whyImportant: 美伊冲突的升级直接导致全球能源市场动荡及安全风险上升。

items.title: Iran and US trade more attacks as Houthis threaten blockade
items.summary: Iran targeted US radar and air defence installations in the Gulf on Tuesday, warning Washington of “more decisive and powerful” attacks to come as the conflict threatened to widen with a blockade of Saudi ports by Houthi rebels in Yemen. Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said they had attacked and stopped two “non-compliant oil tankers” attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz, part of an effort to tighten its grip on the vital waterway while the war reignited. Following the deaths of at least three...
items.titleZh: 伊朗与美国互换攻击，胡塞武装威胁封锁
items.summaryZh: 伊朗革命卫队周二袭击了美国在海湾地区的雷达和防空设施，并扣押了两艘油轮。与此同时，也门胡塞武装宣布对沙特港口实施封锁，使冲突范围有进一步扩大的风险。
items.whyImportant: 冲突的蔓延威胁到关键海上贸易路线的安全，加剧了地区局势的不确定性。

items.title: China won’t waste its reserves to cushion oil price impact of Iran war
items.summary: Oil prices are set to rise once more as renewed US attacks on Iran leave the Strait of Hormuz, a major artery of oil trade, closed again. With US strategic petroleum reserves at their lowest in over 40 years, America will have trouble keeping oil prices below US$100 a barrel, as it has mostly done in the war so far. Analysts warn that sustained oil prices above US$100 risk accelerating inflation, depressing consumption and inviting recession. They have also turned their attention to China and...
items.titleZh: 中国不会动用储备来缓冲伊朗战争对油价的影响
items.summaryZh: 随着美伊冲突导致霍尔木兹海峡再次关闭，全球油价面临上涨压力。分析人士指出，若油价持续维持在每桶100美元以上，可能引发通胀并拖累经济，而中国目前无意动用储备来平抑价格。
items.whyImportant: 油价波动对全球经济复苏及通胀控制构成了严峻挑战。

items.title: Trump exploring additional tariffs on Canada for wildfire smoke impacts in US, White House official says –as it happened
items.summary: This live blog is now closed. Donald Trump to impose 50% tariff on most Canadian goods, White House says Sign up for the Breaking News US email While speaking to reporters on Sunday, Donald Trump acknowledged the three US military casualties as the strikes on Iran continue unabated. “Well, we feel very badly, but you know those great people, those great patriots, were out there fighting that Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon,” Trump said while returning to Washington from the Fifa World Cup final in New Jersey. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 白宫官员称，特朗普正在研究因野火烟雾影响对加拿大加征额外关税——事件回顾
items.summaryZh: 特朗普在从新泽西州返回华盛顿时，对三名美军士兵在伊朗袭击中丧生表示哀悼，并重申了美军阻止伊朗获得核武器的立场。此前白宫宣布将对大多数加拿大商品征收50%的关税。
items.whyImportant: 美加双边关系因贸易关税及政治摩擦而持续紧张。

items.title: Iran claims attacks in strait of Hormuz; Houthis announce blockade of Red Sea shipping route – Middle East crisis live
items.summary: Revolutionary Guard claims attack on oil tanker and two other ships; Houthis in Yemen say they are imposing an immediate maritime blockade of Saudi Arabia in the Red Sea Full report: Almost 100 troops injured in recent weeks, Pentagon admits, as Iran launches reprisals on US allies Iran’s Revolutionary ⁠Guard ⁠said it targeted ​infrastructure belonging ⁠to the US company ⁠Amazon in ​Bahrain, ‌according ‌to ‌a statements published by state media on ‌Tuesday. There was no ​official confirmation from ⁠Bahrain. ​ Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 伊朗声称在霍尔木兹海峡发动袭击；胡塞武装宣布封锁红海航线——中东危机直播
items.summaryZh: 伊朗革命卫队声称袭击了油轮及其他船只，并指控袭击了亚马逊公司在巴林的设施。与此同时，也门胡塞武装宣布对红海的沙特航线实施立即封锁。
items.whyImportant: 针对商业设施和航线的袭击升级，严重威胁到全球供应链的稳定。

items.title: Australia news live: Perth teenager arrested after allegedly stabbing mother to death; Victorian teachers to strike on Thursday
items.summary: Follow today’s news live Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Alpine ski resorts in New South Wales and Victoria saw climate records shattered at the weekend with maximum temperatures up to 12C above average. Ski areas of Mount Hotham and Falls Creek set July records for their hottest daytime and night-time temperatures and Thredbo also set a new hottest July day, according to the Bureau of Meteorology. We want to see more Australian ideas commercialised, more Australian technology deployed globally, and more of the economic value harnessed here at home. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 澳大利亚新闻直播：珀斯一名青少年因涉嫌刺死母亲被捕；维多利亚州教师将于周四罢工
items.summaryZh: 澳大利亚新南威尔士州和维多利亚州的高山滑雪胜地周末气温打破气候记录，最高气温比平均水平高出12摄氏度。气象局数据显示，霍瑟姆山和福尔斯克里克等滑雪区创下了7月最高日间和夜间气温记录。
items.whyImportant: 极端高温天气对澳大利亚滑雪产业及气候环境造成了显著影响。

items.title: ‘Front groups and fellow travelers’: state department attacks US left over Cuba
items.summary: New report denounces Havana and claims ‘campaign of subversion’ has infiltrated highest levels of US government As part of the Trump administration’s continuing attack on left-leaning groups, the US state department has listed several activists and organizations as “front groups and fellow travelers” for Cuba, including Hasan Piker and Amazon Labor Union founder Chris Smalls. In a 100-page report released on Monday, the state department denounces Cuba as the “capital of 21st-century communism”, accusing the Cuban government of carrying out a “campaign of subversion” that has “infiltrated the highest reaches of the US government, recruited and cultivated generations of American activists [and] backed an unprecedented wave of leftwing terrorism on American soil”. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: “前线组织与同路人”：美国国务院抨击美国左翼支持古巴
items.summaryZh: 美国国务院发布一份百页报告，指责古巴实施“颠覆运动”并渗透至美国政府高层。报告将多名活动人士及组织列为古巴的“前线组织与同路人”，并指控其支持美国境内的左翼恐怖主义。
items.whyImportant: 此举标志着美国政府对国内左翼政治力量的打压进一步升级。

items.title: Brazil widens lead in China’s soybean market as US shipments fall despite Trump-Xi deal
items.summary: China imported 12.08 million tonnes of Brazilian soybeans in June, up 13.7 per cent from a year earlier, while volumes from the United States fell 20.6 per cent to 1.27 million tonnes, far off the pace implied by the purchasing deal agreed by Presidents Donald Trump and Xi Jinping, according to figures released on Monday by China’s General Administration of Customs. Total arrivals of the oilseed reached 13.55 million tonnes, a record for the month, lifted by Brazilian supply and by the clearing...
items.titleZh: 尽管有特朗普与习近平的协议，美国大豆出口下降，巴西在华市场份额扩大
items.summaryZh: 中国海关数据显示，6月份中国进口巴西大豆量同比增长13.7%，而美国大豆进口量则下降20.6%。这表明美国大豆出口远未达到两国领导人此前达成的采购协议预期。
items.whyImportant: 美中贸易协议在农产品领域的执行情况不及预期，影响了全球大豆贸易格局。

items.title: Kumanjayi Little Baby’s mother was not supported to protect her children while escaping domestic violence, review finds
items.summary: Interim report not able to draw ‘nexus’ between matters referred to child protection and circumstances leading to five-year-old’s alleged murder •Warning: This story contains references to Indigenous Australians who have died Follow our Australia news live blog for latest updates Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast Kumanjayi Little Baby’s mother was “effectively” left alone to protect her children while also experiencing domestic violence, because child protection authorities failed to adequately assess multiple threats to her safety, a draft review has found. But the interim report, tabled in parliament on Tuesday, found that despite those conclusions, the review was unable to draw a link between the child protection referrals and the five-year-old Warlpiri girl’s death. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 审查发现：库曼贾伊·小宝贝的母亲在逃离家庭暴力时未获得保护子女的支持
items.summaryZh: 一份草拟审查报告指出，儿童保护机构未能充分评估安全威胁，导致库曼贾伊·小宝贝的母亲在遭受家暴时被迫独自保护子女。然而，报告未能证实儿童保护部门的失职与这名五岁女孩的死亡之间存在直接关联。
items.whyImportant: 该事件凸显了澳大利亚儿童保护系统在处理家庭暴力案件时的监管漏洞。

items.title: Almost 100 troops injured in recent weeks, Pentagon admits, as Iran launches reprisals on US allies
items.summary: Iran has attacked a tanker in the strait of Hormuz, forcing its crew to abandon the ship, after the US launched a tenth consecutive night of strikes Middle East crisis live: follow latest updates Nearly 100 US service members have been injured over the last two weeks of escalating strikes on Iran, the Pentagon has said, as Tehran launched a wave of reprisals to the tenth consecutive night of attacks. Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said on Tuesday they had targeted US military sites including air defence systems and a radar installation in Bahrain and Kuwait, while a tanker in the strait of Hormuz reported being ⁠struck by an unknown projectile, forcing its crew to abandon the vessel and board a lifeboat. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 五角大楼承认近几周有近百名士兵受伤，伊朗对美国盟友发动报复
items.summaryZh: 在美伊冲突升级背景下，五角大楼证实过去两周内有近百名美军士兵受伤。伊朗革命卫队声称袭击了巴林和科威特的美国军事设施，同时霍尔木兹海峡一艘油轮遭不明物体袭击。
items.whyImportant: 美伊军事对抗的加剧正导致中东地区安全局势急剧恶化。

items.title: Donald Trump to impose 50% tariff on most Canadian goods, White House says
items.summary: Turmoil likely as Trump officials say Canada unfairly discriminated against US autos, alcohol and dairy products Donald Trump is imposing 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods in response to the country retaliating against previous US tariffs, the White House announced Monday, declaring Canada has unfairly discriminated against American cars, alcohol and dairy products. The tariffs will hit a wide range of products, the White House said, including wine, hockey sticks and cement. They also include goods previously protected from import taxes under the United States-Mexico-Canada (USMCA) agreement. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 白宫称唐纳德·特朗普将对大多数加拿大商品征收50%的关税
items.summaryZh: 白宫宣布，因不满加拿大对美国汽车、酒精和乳制品实施所谓的不公平歧视，特朗普政府将对大多数加拿大商品征收50%的关税。此次关税范围广泛，涵盖了此前受美墨加协定保护的多种商品。
items.whyImportant: 此举将严重冲击美加贸易关系，并可能引发两国间的贸易争端。

items.title: ‘It needs to end now’: Democrats urge Trump to halt Iran war after US troop deaths
items.summary: President accused of having ‘lost control of this war’ as deaths of trio in Iranian military strikes fuel rising concern Democrats have seized on the deaths of three US troops killed in Iranian strikes to urge Donald Trump to urgently reverse his resumption of the war with Iran amid widespread anxiety over climbing casualties. Even as US forces launched a 10th consecutive wave of attacks against Iranian targets, concern over the deaths of American service personnel threatened to complicate moves to escalate the conflict, which has reignited after he last week walked away from a memorandum of understanding agreed with Iran in June. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: “必须立即停止”：民主党人敦促特朗普在美军死亡后停止对伊战争
items.summaryZh: 三名美军士兵在伊朗袭击中丧生，引发民主党人对特朗普政府升级冲突的强烈批评。尽管美军已连续十天对伊朗目标发动攻击，但不断攀升的伤亡人数正使局势变得更加复杂。
items.whyImportant: 美军伤亡事件加剧了美国国内对重启对伊战争的政治压力与担忧。

items.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
items.summary: The US says the attacks were aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.titleZh: 美国对伊朗发动新一轮袭击，特朗普警告将为士兵死亡进行报复
items.summaryZh: 美国对伊朗采取了新一轮军事打击行动。美方表示，此次袭击旨在削弱伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡攻击船只的能力。
items.whyImportant: 美伊双方军事行动的升级进一步推高了地区冲突失控的风险。

items.title: Trump order targets China-linked military mineral supply chains
items.summary: US President Donald Trump on Monday signed an executive order aimed at reducing dependence on China for defence-related critical minerals, directing military contractors to shift away from Beijing-linked supply chains beginning in January 2027. Without naming China, Trump’s executive order stresses the need to maintain US military dominance “in an era of renewed great power competition”. “The United States must secure its supply chains against physical, cyber, and economic subversion,” it...
items.titleZh: 特朗普签署行政令，针对与中国相关的军事矿产供应链
items.summaryZh: 特朗普签署行政令，要求减少国防关键矿产对中国的依赖，并指示军事承包商从2027年1月起逐步脱离与中国相关的供应链。该命令强调在“大国竞争时代”维护美国军事优势的重要性。
items.whyImportant: 此举旨在通过供应链重组削弱中国在关键国防资源领域的影响力。

items.title: Japan says Chinese and Russian warships held live-fire drills within its EEZ
items.summary: Chinese and Russian navy ships were spotted conducting joint live-fire drills within Japan’s claimed exclusive economic zone in the Pacific Ocean on Sunday, its defence ministry said. Japanese Defence Minister Shinjiro Koizumi first revealed that the two navies had held drills in Japan’s EEZ during an address to the Farnborough International Airshow in Britain on Monday, highlighting their deepening military cooperation, according to media reports. Japan’s defence ministry later confirmed that...
items.titleZh: 日本称中俄军舰在其专属经济区内进行实弹演习
items.summaryZh: 日本防卫省表示，中俄海军舰艇周日在日本专属经济区内进行了联合实弹演习。日本防卫大臣小泉进次郎在英国航展上强调了此举反映出两国军事合作的深化。
items.whyImportant: 中俄在敏感海域的联合军事活动引发了日本对地区安全局势的关注。

items.title: US claims 3 China-linked spy sites in Cuba monitoring American military activity
items.summary: The United States has accused China of operating three intelligence-gathering facilities in Cuba and sharply expanding its personnel on the island, portraying Havana as a strategic platform for Beijing to monitor American military activity. A State Department report released on Monday said China maintained a “persistent intelligence-gathering presence” in Cuba, whose location gives Beijing potential access to electronic communications, military installations and maritime activity in the...
items.titleZh: 美国声称中国在古巴设有三个间谍站点，用于监控美国军事活动
items.summaryZh: 美国国务院报告指控中国在古巴运营三个情报收集设施，并大幅增加人员部署。美方认为古巴已成为北京监控美国军事活动和电子通信的战略平台。
items.whyImportant: 美方对中国在古巴情报活动的指控加剧了美中之间的地缘政治紧张关系。

items.title: SpaceX slump fails to dent Hong Kong tech as investors seen pivoting
items.summary: A sharp pullback in US space-technology giant SpaceX and renewed valuation pressure on Wall Street’s tech heavyweights are unlikely to trigger a major sell-off in Hong Kong equities, according to analysts, who note that local tech firms operate under distinct business models and lack the stretched valuations of their overseas peers. “I don’t think there will be much impact” in Hong Kong, said Kenny Tang Sing-hing, chairman of the Hong Kong Institute of Financial Analysts and Professional...
items.titleZh: SpaceX股价下跌未冲击香港科技股，投资者被视为正在转向
items.summaryZh: 分析人士认为，美国太空技术巨头SpaceX的股价回调及华尔街科技股的估值压力，不太可能引发香港股市的大规模抛售。专家指出，香港科技公司拥有独特的商业模式，且估值并未像海外同行那样处于高位。
items.whyImportant: 香港科技股表现出与美股科技板块一定的脱钩趋势，显示出市场韧性。

items.title: India joins China, US in commercial space race with Skyroot launch
items.summary: India’s first privately developed orbital rocket has given the country’s fledgling commercial space industry a long-sought proof point, but analysts say Skyroot Aerospace must now show it can launch regularly, cheaply and reliably enough to win customers in a crowded global market. Skyroot’s Vikram-1 rocket lifted off on Saturday from the Satish Dhawan Space Centre in Sriharikota in the southern Indian state of Andhra Pradesh, carrying several customer payloads and in-orbit experiments on its...
items.titleZh: 印度凭借Skyroot的发射加入中美的商业太空竞赛
items.summaryZh: 印度首枚私营轨道火箭Vikram-1成功发射，标志着该国商业航天产业取得重要进展。分析人士指出，Skyroot Aerospace公司目前需证明其具备定期、低成本且可靠的发射能力，以在竞争激烈的全球市场中立足。
items.whyImportant: 印度在商业航天领域的突破加剧了全球私营航天市场的竞争。

items.title: Teenager sent to detention centre for attempted voyeurism in school toilet
items.summary: A 16-year-old Hong Kong student has been sentenced to up to six months at a detention centre for attempted voyeurism after he admitted to trying to spy on a female pupil in a school toilet. Kowloon City Court Magistrate Tsang Chung-yiu on Tuesday told the student to reflect on his actions as he spent the next few months at the Sha Tsui Correctional Institution, which is for young offenders. The defendant earlier pleaded guilty to a count of attempted voyeurism. He was caught in the act by the...
items.titleZh: 一名青少年因在学校厕所企图偷窥被送往教导所
items.summaryZh: 一名16岁香港学生因承认在学校厕所企图偷窥女同学，被法院判处在教导所服刑最长六个月。法官要求该学生在沙咀惩教所服刑期间深刻反省其行为。
items.whyImportant: 该判决反映了香港司法机构对校园性骚扰及偷窥行为的严厉打击态度。

items.title: US attacks Iran for 10th consecutive night
items.summary: Washington vows revenge for US military casualties, while Iran claims attacks on US sites across the region.
items.titleZh: 美国连续第十晚袭击伊朗
items.summaryZh: 华盛顿誓言为美军伤亡进行报复，而伊朗则声称已对该地区的美国设施发动了反击。
items.whyImportant: 美伊双方持续的军事报复行动使地区冲突陷入恶性循环。

items.title: How Chinese police infiltrated and monitored the dark web with the help of AI tools
items.summary: Chinese police scientists have offered a rare insight into how they were able to break into the dark web using artificial intelligence to decode underground content. The dark web – a realm unfamiliar to most – is built on encrypted communications and anonymous routing technologies that render user activity nearly untraceable, making it a haven for illegal activity and data trafficking. In recent years, researchers both in China and abroad have made progress in analysing dark web content, but...
items.titleZh: 中国警方如何利用人工智能工具渗透和监控暗网
items.summaryZh: 中国警方科研人员展示了如何利用人工智能技术解码暗网中的加密内容。暗网因其匿名性和加密通信常被用于非法活动，而AI技术的应用显著提升了警方追踪和分析此类非法数据的能力。
items.whyImportant: 人工智能在网络犯罪侦查中的应用正成为各国执法部门提升打击能力的关键。

items.title: UK military ‘eyes innovative electric flying taxi’ as 2029 launch planned
items.summary: Vertical Aerospace says government has given £10m backing, taking its total investment in the project to £48m British flying taxi startup Vertical Aerospace has said the UK government has expressed interest in buying a military variant of its aircraft as it races to gain approval for flights with paying passengers. Vertical also welcomed another £10m grant from the government, taking its total UK state funding to £48m. Continue reading...
items.titleZh: 英国军方“着眼于创新型电动飞行出租车”，计划2029年推出
items.summaryZh: 英国飞行出租车初创公司Vertical Aerospace获得政府1000万英镑资助，总投资额达4800万英镑。该公司表示，英国政府已对其飞机的军事变体表现出兴趣，目前正加速争取载客飞行许可。
items.whyImportant: 政府对飞行出租车技术的投资显示了英国在未来交通及国防创新领域的战略布局。

items.title: Chinese robot makers’ lament: if we only had a better ‘brain’, and more data
items.summary: Chinese robotics companies lack both sufficient data and a good “brain” to improve the interaction of their products with the physical world, according to industry insiders at the World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), which concluded on Monday in Shanghai. The most critical challenge for the embodied AI industry was to “link hardware, data, models and real-world scenarios into a closed-loop iterative system”, said Wang Xiaogang, co-founder of SenseTime and chairman of its robotics...
items.titleZh: 中国机器人制造商的感叹：如果我们有一个更好的“大脑”和更多的数据
items.summaryZh: 在上海举行的世界人工智能大会上，行业专家指出，中国机器人公司在数据积累和“大脑”模型方面仍面临挑战。核心难点在于如何将硬件、数据和模型有效整合，实现物理世界的闭环迭代。
items.whyImportant: 机器人产业在具身智能领域的瓶颈，反映了中国在高端人工智能应用方面仍需进一步突破。
